design_philosophy: Godly-level Awwwards standard. Asymmetric editorial layouts, sharp jewel-tone commitments, custom cursors/selection, iridescent shader color specs, staggered motion timings, and glass/grain overlays.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase with wide tracking.
Avoid bold weights for headings; use light or regular to maintain editorial elegance.
Never use pure black; always use a deep obsidian or sapphire-tinted dark base.
Use gold sparingly for highlights, borders, and interactive states.
Text selection should use a sapphire background with gold text.
Avoid symmetric grids. Use 3-column / 5-column or offset spans for an editorial feel.
Overlap text and images to create depth.
Apply high padding within bordered containers.

surfaces_and_textures.grain_overlay: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-screen bg-[url('/noise.png')] z-50
surfaces_and_textures.shimmer_effect: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-translate-x-full before:animate-[shimmer_2s_infinite] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-white/10 before:to-transparent

interactions_and_motion.scroll: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. GSAP ScrollTrigger for pinned sections and parallax.
interactions_and_motion.cursor: Custom dot cursor that expands on hover and shifts color to gold.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (1.05) inside hidden-overflow containers. Text shifts color slightly or gains a subtle glow.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1) for a cinematic, weighted feel.

Hero.concept: Pinned 3D procedural peacock with iridescent shader. Feathers fan out dynamically. Typographic reveal.
Hero.motion: Camera zooms slightly on scroll. Feathers animate open sequentially. Brand text 'Peacock Blouse House' fades/types in with gold shimmer.

AboutUs.concept: Zoom continues from hero, passing through a feather structure into a deep background. Text panels reveal asynchronously.
AboutUs.motion: Panel-by-panel slide up and fade. Background morphs to a subtle floating fabric/particle texture.

ClothQuality.concept: Extreme close-up macro shots of luxury fabric. Cinematic layout with large typography stats.
ClothQuality.motion: Scroll-triggered zoom into fabric images. Animated counting-up stats for '100% Premium Cotton' etc.

WhyChooseUs.concept: Staggered feature cards representing brand pillars. 3D tilt effect on hover.
WhyChooseUs.motion: Cards animate in with stagger scale/fade. Parallax image inside card on hover.

Footer.concept: Dark, expansive footer with a shimmering peacock feather divider.
Footer.motion: Divider shimmers continuously. Footer content reveals smoothly on intersection.

images.description: Rich blue satin fabric highlighting luxurious texture.
Luxurious fabric adorned with intricate gold embroidery.
Teal and green peafowl feather texture.

rules: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic UI libraries for the main layout; build custom HTML/Tailwind for maximum editorial control.
Implement Lenis at the root layout for momentum scrolling.
Build the 3D procedural peacock feather using shaders in R3F—do not load an external GLB asset. The shader should transition between teal, blue, green, and gold based on camera angle/normal.
Use GSAP ScrollTrigger to pin the Hero section, transition the 3D camera into the feather, and reveal the About Us content.
Ensure the preloader is built with a dark theme and shows a percentage loaded.
Add a global ambient sound toggle (muted by default) that plays a subtle, atmospheric drone or nature sound.
Ensure all text remains readable via contrast or text-shadows.
